name: RMW - G3A1

description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The Old Timer of the Bundeswehr. Deifned the West German Army in the Cold War. Replaced by the G36 Series after the Berlin Wall fell. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
